prompt: A clean manga-coloring test page styled like an official One Piece chapter cover on a light gray background. At the very top, place the large black-and-white ONE PIECE logo with the skull wearing a yellow straw hat with a red band, integrated rope elements, and the silhouette inside the lettering. Centered beneath it, add the subtitle text Chapter 1177: FURIOUS in bold black serif italics. Below that, create one large rectangular full-color illustration framed by a thin black border. The scene shows Nico Robin, a young woman with long straight black hair and pale skin, seated in a garden with her knees drawn up, planting flowers. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur censor block. She wears a loose white short-sleeve shirt and black-and-white horizontal striped thigh-high socks, giving a casual, slightly playful look. Around her are 3 small One Piece characters helping or watching: on the left, Tony Tony Chopper in a straw hat and blue overalls holding a small shovel near freshly dug soil; in the right foreground, another small chibi-like Chopper figure wearing a blue cap with round yellow ear covers labeled “MOGO” and pink shorts, turned partly away; near the center-left foreground, a tiny helper with goggles and a hat standing by the flower bed. The garden is whimsical and storybook-like: a huge old tree with a thick twisting trunk fills the left side, a white picket fence runs behind the flower beds, and a crooked cozy cottage with blue scalloped roof tiles, dormer windows, flower boxes, and a round wooden door stands on the right. The sky is bright blue with a few puffy white clouds. In the flower bed, show exactly 3 distinct flower clusters being planted: 1 pink cluster in Robin’s hands, 1 white cluster to the right, and 1 orange cluster farther right, with several dug holes in the brown soil and chopped tree stumps in the foreground. Add a caption strip overlapping the bottom of the illustration with uppercase serif text: {argument name="caption text" default="READER REQUEST: \"ROBIN PLANTING FLOWERS IN A BED DUG UP BY MOLES\" BY MRS. FUJI"}. Beneath the image, center the credit line By EIICHIRO ODA in bold black type, and below it a smaller line reading Translation: STEPHEN PAUL • Lettering: VANESSA SATONE. Use crisp inked manga linework with vibrant hand-colored fills, slightly textured shading, and an authentic colored manga cover-page aesthetic.
